default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the code components POC and define the project's future.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The code components POC is a success, validating the technical feasibility of creating interactive components for Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [The project will adopt a "Made in Webflow" model for the component gallery, using iframes to showcase live demos. This strategy leverages a proven SEO driver and aligns with the "built on Webflow" principle.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [A Webflow-owned GitHub repo and NPM package will manage component distribution, providing a secure, curated library that addresses internal security concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [The project will be scoped to 300–400+ components (core types + variants) to build a comprehensive library that goes beyond a simple ShadCN clone.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)

## Topics

### Code Components POC Review

  - [**POC Success:** The proof of concept (POC) successfully validated the technical feasibility of creating interactive code components for Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [**Component Structure:** Each component consists of a TypeScript file, a style file, and a DevLink config file for Webflow import.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**Access:** Colin requested access to the Webflow demo site workspace and the component GitHub repo for a full technical review.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

### Distribution & Security Strategy

  - [**Problem:** A key blocker was the security risk of promoting unvetted, community-contributed code.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [**Solution:** Webflow will own a central GitHub repo and NPM package for all components.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This model allows Webflow to review and approve all contributions, ensuring security and quality.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX will contribute new components via pull requests to this repo.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)

### Component Gallery & SEO Strategy

  - [**Challenge:** Define the gallery's technical foundation and SEO strategy to maximize organic reach.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [**Decision: Adopt "Made in Webflow" Model**](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**Method:** Each component will have a dedicated page on a Webflow site, which is then embedded as an iframe in the main gallery.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This strategy leverages a proven SEO driver and aligns with the "built on Webflow" principle.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**SEO Focus:** The primary SEO value will come from long-tail category pages (e.g., "Webflow gallery component"), not individual component pages.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [**Implementation:** Colin will propose this model to the Marketplace team.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Project Scope & Future Vision

  - [**Initial Scope:** The project will aim for 300–400+ components.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This scope provides a comprehensive library by including core component types (e.g., ShadCN's 60) plus multiple variants for each.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [**Future Vision: AI Integration**](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
      - [The library could serve as a high-quality seed for AI tools like Cursor to generate styled, Webflow-compatible components.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)

### Integration Pages & Use Case Guides

  - [**Performance:** Integration pages are performing well, driving both SEO and internal sales references.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [**New Content:** GrowthX is now publishing use case guides (5/week) and aggregation pages (30/week).](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
  - [**Data Request:** Vivian will pull traffic and sign-up data for these new content types from Snowflake to track performance.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
      - [Grant Colin access to the component demo site workspace and GitHub repo.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [Estimate the effort required to build 300–400+ components.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [**Colin:**](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [Propose the "Made in Webflow" gallery model to the Marketplace team.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [Draft a proposal for the Webflow-owned component repo and package.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [**Vivian:**](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)
      - [Pull traffic and signup data for the new use case guides and aggregation pages.](https://fathom.video/share/ph5AksWro4AJd5zqgsog69vhtBpSmiX5?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)

Pull Snowflake traffic/signups for integration pages and use-case guides; share w/ Colin + Jason
